acceptanceCovered: D6-09: POST /import-posts → posts persisted in DB → IMPORT_COMPLETED JMS published (AFTER_COMMIT) → ImportStatsCache updated → MetricsBroadcaster.broadcast('IMPORT_COMPLETE') called; TC-01 valid upload, TC-02 duplicate rejected, TC-03 unauthenticated redirect — verified: TC-01 asserts postRepository.count()==2, Awaitility untilAsserted confirms importStatsCache.get().get().totalPosts()==2 + Mockito verify(metricsBroadcaster,atLeastOnce()).broadcast('IMPORT_COMPLETE'); TC-02 duplicate returns FAILED + postRepository.count() unchanged + stats cache unchanged; TC-03 no auth → status().is3xxRedirection()

D6-10: CrawlJobService.updateSocialMetricsJob() → one SocialMetric row per ACTIVE post saved → MetricsBroadcaster.broadcast('CRAWL_COMPLETE') called; TC-01 save + broadcast, TC-02 DELETED posts skipped, TC-03 lastCrawledAt updated — verified: TC-01 socialMetricRepository.count()==SEED_POST_COUNT(2) + verify(metricsBroadcaster).broadcast('CRAWL_COMPLETE'); TC-02 DELETED post added but count stays SEED_POST_COUNT; TC-03 lastCrawledAt not null and isAfter(before) when before was set

findings.summary: TC-02 stats assertion on importStatsCache could return -1L if JMS from first import had not yet processed; fixed by adding Awaitility await before second import
userRepository.findAll().get(0) ordering not guaranteed by JPA spec; fixed by replacing with findFirstByOrderByIdAsc().orElseThrow()
